name: GenTeam
description: OpenClaw channel plugin connecting a self-hosted gateway to GenTeam as an Agent runtime.

genteam.label: GenTeam
genteam.description: Connect this gateway to GenTeam as an Agent runtime.

schema.description: Named accounts under `accounts` (the runtime reads `channels.genteam.accounts.<id>`; install.sh writes `accounts.default`). Mirrors OpenClaw's catchall multi-account channel shape.

defaultAccount.description: Account id to use when none is specified (default: "default").

accounts.description: Named GenTeam connections (the runtime reads accounts.<id>).

attachmentRoots.description: Absolute directories the attachment upload tool may read from. Leave empty to disable attachment uploads.

attachmentDownloadDir.description: Absolute directory where de_attachment_view saves downloaded attachment files. Defaults to a private, unpredictably-named per-process subdir of the system temp dir. Set this to a directory the agent's file tools can read when the gateway runs the agent workspace-rooted.

attachmentDownloadMaxBytes.description: Maximum size (bytes) of a single attachment de_attachment_view will download. Defaults to 1 GiB.
